name: Toyyibpay
description: Toyyibpay — Malaysia payment gateway for SMBs supporting FPX bank transfers, credit cards, and e-wallets via simple hosted checkout.

seo.title: Toyyibpay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Toyyibpay: Toyyibpay — Malaysia payment gateway for SMBs supporting FPX bank transfers, credit cards, and e-wallets via simple hosted checkout.

when_to_use: FPX bank transfer checkout for Malaysian SMB e-commerce
e-wallet and credit card acceptance for Malaysian merchants
Simple hosted checkout for Malaysian online businesses

pros: Cheap and simple for Malaysian SMBs
FPX bank transfer support out of box
Low barrier to entry for small sellers
cons: Not built for high-volume or complex flows
Support is basic vs enterprise gateways
review.verdict: Dead-simple Malaysian checkout for small merchants — outgrown quickly once you need real API control.
review.best_for: Malaysian SMBs and solo sellers needing cheap FPX and card checkout
review.not_for: Scaling platforms needing full APIs, webhooks, and reliability SLAs
